mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT REQ.IIR_REQ_NO AS iirReqNo, NVL(REQ.IIR_MAIN_GOODS_NM, '-') AS iirMainGoodsNm, TO_CHAR(REQ.IIR_RPLY_DDLINE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS iirRplyDdlineDt,
CASE WHEN TRUNC(REQ.IIR_RPLY_DDLINE_DT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'D-DAY'
WHEN TRUNC(REQ.IIR_RPLY_DDLINE_DT) > TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'D-' || TO_CHAR(TRUNC(REQ.IIR_RPLY_DDLINE_DT) - TRUNC(SYSDATE)) END AS ddayText,
CASE WHEN TRUNC(REQ.IIR_RPLY_DDLINE_DT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'dday' ELSE 'safe' END AS ddayClass
FROM IMP_INS_REQ REQ WHERE REQ.IIR_RPLY_DDLINE_DT IS NOT NULL
/* 이미 지난 회신기한 제외 */ AND REQ.IIR_RPLY_DDLINE_DT >= SYSDATE
/* 완료/취소 건 제외 */ AND REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD NOT IN ('완료', '취소')
ORDER BY REQ.IIR_RPLY_DDLINE_DT ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
